name: Prince Edward Island Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large stock pot, melt butter and add onion. Cook over medium heat until the onion is transparent.
2. Place diced potatoes, carrots, water, and OXO cubes in another large stock pot and bring to a boil. Cook until tender (about 10 minutes). Season with pepper to taste.
3. When the vegetables are cooked, add flour to the onion to form a paste.
4. Gradually add milk, mixing well and heating over low heat until warm.
5. Add the vegetables and liquid mixture, stirring thoroughly. Heat for 5 to 10 minutes over medium heat, stirring occasionally until the mixture thickens slightly.
6. Stir in parsley and thyme. Ensure everything is heated through before serving.
7. Note: Water and OXO cubes can be replaced with 3 cups of chicken stock if preferred.
